items.title: AI Adoption and Cloud Growth to Boost Salesforce's Q2 Earnings?
items.description: CRM's Q2 results are likely to reflect the benefits of the rising demand for AI and cloud. However, macro headwinds and slower deal cycles may limit the upside.

items.title: US Stock Futures Steady as Investors Weigh Tariff Court Verdict
items.description: The New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq were closed for Labor Day.  Contracts for S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 were little changed as of 9:31 a.m. in New York.  The market is bracing for what is known as the weakest month for US shares, as institutional investors rebalance, retail traders slow their buying and volatility picks up.

items.title: mindZvue Names Salesforce Pioneer Vinay Chaturvedi as CEO to Drive Global Growth and Digital Transformation
items.description: mindZvue, a Salesforce Summit Partner has appointed Vinay Chaturvedi as Chief Executive Officer, underscoring the convergence of artificial intelligence and Salesforce. His appointment signals the company's intent to evolve beyond its role as a Salesforce Summit Partner into a global innovation leader, blending AI, automation, and Salesforce expertise into what it calls Innovation-as-a-Service.

items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Valuation: Weighing AI Partnerships and Federal Expansion Against Market Expectations
items.description: If you have been keeping an eye on Salesforce (CRM), the recent announcements from both Emergent and Seismic might be enough to make you reconsider your position. Emergent, a leading public sector technology provider, just closed a deal to offer Salesforce solutions, including Agentforce, through the GSA contract. This opens the door for greater adoption by federal agencies striving to modernize services with trusted AI. Meanwhile, Seismic has rolled out new integrations with Salesforce's...

items.title: Is Salesforce Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
items.description: Although Salesforce has underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, analysts are very upbeat about the stock’s prospects.
